summary: Full backend + frontend validation for Mayur Abrasives hero-image-carousel, new-products section, admin slider management (URL + file upload), product is_new flag, and footer cleanup. 9/9 backend tests passed; all frontend UI assertions passed including section ordering, slider auto-advance/prev/next/dot navigation, admin slider panel (5 slots + interval + save), and admin product is_new + is_featured toggles.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~915 lines and approaching the 700-line guideline; consider splitting into modules (auth, products, settings, uploads, video) for maintainability.

CORS allow_origins includes '*' while allow_credentials=True; browsers ignore '*' when credentials=true. The explicit FRONTEND_URL/localhost entries do work, but the '*' is misleading and should be removed.
upload-image stores images as base64 data URLs in MongoDB. This works but bloats settings doc and DB size; consider object storage or filesystem for production beyond a few small images.
Bare `except:` blocks in product/dealer/inquiry/catalog routes will mask unexpected errors; prefer `except (InvalidId, Exception)` or explicit ObjectId validation.
Slider auto-advance uses setTimeout reset on every index change; functional but a single setInterval would be marginally cleaner. Current impl is correct.
HeroSlider has no pause-on-hover or prefers-reduced-motion handling (accessibility nice-to-have).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all hero slider, section order, admin settings, admin product toggles, footer assertions passed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 3 is_new=true products and 5 seeded slider_images.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_slider_and_products.py covers: GET/PUT /api/settings slider fields, POST /api/upload-image (admin-only, image-only, 5MB cap, base64 data URL), and product is_new filter + CRUD. Admin auth uses Bearer token from POST /api/auth/login (also sets httpOnly cookies). Homepage section order verified via DOM rect tops: hero(0) -> new-products(1772) -> featured(2466) -> categories(3160). Active hero slide detection: dot uses class 'w-8' when active, 'w-3' otherwise.
tested_features: GET /api/settings returns slider_images + slider_interval with defaults
PUT /api/settings updates slider_images and slider_interval (admin required)
POST /api/upload-image - admin required, rejects non-images, rejects >5MB, returns base64 data URL
Product is_new field on create/update/get, ?is_new=true filter
Homepage HeroSlider: 5 slides, prev/next, 5 dots, dot navigation, 3s auto-advance
Homepage section order Hero -> NewProducts -> Featured -> Categories -> WhyChoose -> Industries -> Testimonials -> CTA
Admin Settings: 5 slider slots, slider-interval-input, save-slider-btn persist
Admin Products form: product-is-featured-toggle + product-is-new-toggle both present
Footer has no App Store / Play Store / download app links
